title: Hexagonal
description: Hexagonal documents overview material for Hexagonal in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 도메인 계층, 애플리케이션 계층, 사용자 시나리오UseCase, 애플리케이션 서비스, and 유저 인터페이스 계층, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include ddd, language, and concepts, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / hexagonal / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
